privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
content: Your privacy is important to us. It is Brainstorming's policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you across our website, and other sites we own and operate.

We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also let you know why we're collecting it and how it will be used.

We only retain collected information for as long as necessary to provide you with your requested service. What data we store, we'll protect within commercially acceptable means to prevent loss and theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.

1.title: Art. 1: Acceptance of the conditions
content: The following conditions apply to all offers and deliveries carried out by the company and to the agreements concluded between the company and the customer, unless the company has expressly agreed otherwise in writing.
The general purchase conditions of the customer are only valid if they correspond to the general conditions of the company or have been expressly accepted by the company in writing.

2.title: Art. 2: Prices
content: The customer is obliged to pay the price. This is determined based on market and price conditions. Any increase between the conclusion of the agreement and the delivery will be passed on to the customer.

The company is entitled to apply a proportional price increase in the event of circumstances beyond its control, such as increases in duties and excise duties, freight prices, raw materials, wages, collective labor agreements or currency changes.
VAT, other taxes, transport and packaging costs are at the customer's expense.

3.title: Art. 3: Payment
content: All invoices are payable in cash upon receipt, unless otherwise agreed in writing. All payment costs are at the customer's expense.
Invoices are considered accepted in the absence of written protest within 7 days after dispatch.
In case of non-payment, default interest of 1.5% per started month is due by operation of law, as well as a flat-rate compensation of 15% of the invoice amount (minimum €74.37).
Late payment makes all outstanding invoices immediately due and gives the company the right to terminate the agreement without notice.

4.title: Art. 4: Delivery and complaints
content: Delivery takes place ex works. The goods always travel at the customer's risk, regardless of who organizes the transport.
The customer must check the goods immediately upon delivery. Defects must be reported in writing and confirmed within 3 hours after discovery.
Late complaints are not accepted. The company must always have the opportunity to check the delivered goods.

5.title: Art. 5: Retention of title
content: The delivered goods remain the property of the company until full payment of all amounts due, including interest and costs.
In case of non-payment, bankruptcy or seizure, the company is entitled to take back the goods at the customer's expense and risk.

6.title: Art. 6: Express termination clause
content: In case of non-compliance with obligations, the agreement may be considered terminated, with a flat-rate compensation of 25% of the price of the goods, without prejudice to the right to higher compensation.

7.title: Art. 7: Jurisdiction
content: For all disputes, only the courts of the District of Antwerp are competent and Belgian law applies.
